title: Usage
description: A usage record for metered/usage-based billing in Ordway

company_id.description: Identifier for the Ordway company account

usage_id.description: Unique identifier for the usage record

subscription_line_id.description: ID of the subscription line item this usage applies to

date.description: Date and time when the usage occurred

unit_of_measure.description: Unit of measurement for the quantity

invoiced.description: Whether this usage has been billed on an invoice

created_by.description: User or system that created the record

updated_by.description: User or system that last updated the record

created_date.description: Timestamp when the record was created

updated_date.description: Timestamp when the record was last updated
